title: Heroes & Comics
subtitle: Superhero films and broader comic-book adaptations.

sections.name: I. Marvel — MCU
sections.desc: Marvel Studios proper. Iron Man through current.

sections.name: II. Marvel — Non-MCU
sections.desc: Fox X-Men/FF era, Sony Spider-Verse, Sony alt-Marvel, Spider-Man trilogies.

sections.name: III. DC
sections.desc: DC Extended Universe, Snyderverse, current DCU, prior eras.

items.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
items.pitch: Todd Phillips's musical sequel to 2019's Joker. Phoenix and Lady Gaga in a folie-à-deux courtroom-and-Arkham two-hander built on jukebox standards. Polarizing — read as either a brave deconstruction of fan expectation or a betrayal of the first film, depending on who you ask.
items.whyPriority: Watched. Cataloged for tracking. Pairs with the original Joker (2019) when added.

sections.name: IV. Indie / Other Publishers
sections.desc: Hellboy, Dredd, Kick-Ass, Image, Dark Horse, etc.

sections.name: V. Deconstructive
sections.desc: Watchmen, Joker, the genre interrogating itself.

sections.name: VI. Cosmic
sections.desc: Guardians of the Galaxy, Eternals, Captain Marvel, the space-tier of the genre.

sections.name: IX. Non-Comic Super-Powered
sections.desc: Unbreakable, Chronicle, The Incredibles, Brightburn — superpowers without the comic source.
